mapper.select: SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.track_id, a.track_nm, a.album_id, f.artist_id repArtistId, f.artist_nm repArtistNm, a.track_sn, a.agency_id, if(a.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR a.pps_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') holdbackYn, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, d.artist_id, d.artist_nm, b.album_img_size size, CONCAT(b.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(b.update_dtime)) url, a.trackCreateDtime, a.trackUpdateDtime FROM ( SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, c.track_id , c.track_nm, c.album_id, c.reprsnt_artist_id, b.track_sn, c.agency_id, c.streaming_premium_yn, c.pps_yn, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, c.create_dtime trackCreateDtime, c.update_dtime trackUpdateDtime FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track b ON a.chnl_id = b.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id WHERE a.rank_chnl_type = '1HOUR' AND a.disp_status_type ='Y' AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY b.track_sn LIMIT 0 , 12 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img b ON a.album_id = b.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist as c ON a.track_id = c.track_id AND c.rp_yn = 'Y' and c.db_sts = 'A' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_album e ON a.album_id = e.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist f ON a.reprsnt_artist_id = f.artist_id
